/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfastlio_imu__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libfastlio_imu__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/fastlio_imu__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/fastlio_imu/msg/newmsg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sunrise/livox_ws/src/build:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libfastlio_imu__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
